Effect version: unknown

/.src/missingPipeableSignature_preview.ts(4,14): warning TS377101: Exported function `getAt` has no pipeable overload corresponding to its signature `(self: ReadonlyArray<string>, index: number) => string`. effect(missingPipeableSignature)


==== /.src/missingPipeableSignature_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics missingPipeableSignature:warning
    
    export const getAt = (self: ReadonlyArray<string>, index: number): string => self[index]
                 ~~~~~
!!! warning TS377101: Exported function `getAt` has no pipeable overload corresponding to its signature `(self: ReadonlyArray<string>, index: number) => string`. effect(missingPipeableSignature)
